'''鈭歞-j-r-ng''' ('''kadajrengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jesuitize|jesuitize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-j-r-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jesuitize|jesuitize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-j-r-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kadajrengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidajrengoko|thidajrengoko]] || [[word:jidajrengoko|jidajrengoko]] || [[word:shidajrengoko|shidajrengoko]] || [[word:kidajrengoko|kidajrengoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudajrengoko|thuthudajrengoko]] || [[word:jujudajrengoko|jujudajrengoko]] || [[word:shushudajrengoko|shushudajrengoko]] || [[word:kukudajrengoko|kukudajrengoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodajrengoko|thothodajrengoko]] || [[word:jojodajrengoko|jojodajrengoko]] || [[word:shoshodajrengoko|shoshodajrengoko]] || [[word:kokodajrengoko|kokodajrengoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodajrengoko|thodajrengoko]] || [[word:jodajrengoko|jodajrengoko]] || [[word:shodajrengoko|shodajrengoko]] || [[word:kodajrengoko|kodajrengoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodajrengoko|thodajrengoko]] || [[word:jodajrengoko|jodajrengoko]] || [[word:shodajrengoko|shodajrengoko]] || [[word:kodajrengoko|kodajrengoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dajrengoko|th忙dajrengoko]] || [[word:j忙dajrengoko|j忙dajrengoko]] || [[word:sh忙dajrengoko|sh忙dajrengoko]] || [[word:k忙dajrengoko|k忙dajrengoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadajrengoko|thathadajrengoko]] || [[word:jajadajrengoko|jajadajrengoko]] || [[word:shashadajrengoko|shashadajrengoko]] || [[word:kakadajrengoko|kakadajrengoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadajrengoko|thadajrengoko]] || [[word:jadajrengoko|jadajrengoko]] || [[word:shadajrengoko|shadajrengoko]] || [[word:kadajrengoko|kadajrengoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadajrengoko|thadajrengoko]] || [[word:jadajrengoko|jadajrengoko]] || [[word:shadajrengoko|shadajrengoko]] || [[word:kadajrengoko|kadajrengoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
